---
name: Loom
about: Track a single audit Loom from dossier to send
title: "[LOOM] "
labels: ["loom"]
assignees: []
---

## Target

- **Company:**
- **Prospect issue:** #
- **Channel:** (LinkedIn / X / email)
- **Send by:** YYYY-MM-DD

## Dossier (6 hours)

- [ ] Hero screenshot at 2x retina, cropped 1920×1080
- [ ] Three artifacts (deck slide / pricing page / feature page)
- [ ] Last social post screenshot
- [ ] App login / onboarding screenshot
- [ ] Three reference artifacts at the right tier
- [ ] Founder name, role, last public statement
- [ ] Last fundraise headline + lead investor

## Script (kit/audit-loom-template.md)

- [ ] Beat 1 — open (3 sentences, on camera, no screen)
- [ ] Beat 2 — verdict (1 sentence verdict + 1 sentence cost + 3 faults named)
- [ ] Beat 3 — teardown (4 min, side-by-side, cursor as pointer)
- [ ] Beat 4 — fix (3 bullets, third bullet is leave-alone)
- [ ] Beat 5 — close (4 sentences, memorized)

## Record + post

- [ ] Intro card rendered (`video/out/audit-loom-intro.mp4`)
- [ ] Outro card rendered (`video/out/audit-loom-outro.mp4`)
- [ ] Loom recorded, watched back at 1.5x
- [ ] Custom thumbnail
- [ ] Custom title: `MOBIUS audit — [Company]`
- [ ] Run script through `noise-cancel` discipline

## Send

- [ ] DM body filled from `kit/outreach/drafts.md`
- [ ] Sent at 7am SAST (or US business hours if X)
- [ ] Logged in `prospects/scores.csv`

## Result

- **Sent:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Reply by:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Response:** (none / accept / reply / book / close / dead)
